visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish-brown hair is seen in a studio setting, standing in front of a silver professional microphone with a pop filter. He wears a black T-shirt over patterned long-sleeve undershirts and a thick black chain necklace. He has large black headphones on. His mouth moves rhythmically as if singing, with expressive facial contortions and hand gestures such as opening his palms and pointing. The background consists of dark green curtains. (2) The camera switches to a close-up of the man's face. He closes his eyes and tilts his head back while his mouth remains open in a vocalizing pose. A warm, yellow-glowing lamp is visible behind him. His hands are raised near his chest, fingers slightly curled. (3) The man continues his expressive movements, alternating between looking directly at the mic and looking off-camera. He uses strong hand movements, including clenching his fist and pointing towards his chest. (4) The visual pace shifts as the man stops the singing-like mouth movements. He begins to dance and move his body with high energy, looking side to side and making exaggerated facial expressions. He checks his sleeve and continues to groove to an unseen rhythm.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 底這個台北 無人欲聽我的心聲. (2) [Subtitle]: 生份的傷心變作 一條條的歌. (3) [Subtitle]: 無人要插稍一個 無錢嘛無人面的. (4) [Subtitle]: 跌倒嘛沒人會扶. (5) [Subtitle]: 我想起少年時陣 點一支菸. (6) [Subtitle]: 啥物煩惱跟麻煩 像風吹一陣. (7) [Subtitle]: 我就是這呢憨 以為打拼我就會成功. (8) [Subtitle]: 我怨嘆這個 無情無義的社會. (9) [Subtitle]: 想要講啥物 我這馬攏沒資格. (10) [Subtitle]: 講袂出心內話 我早就已經後悔. (11) [Subtitle]: 我想要一個 安穩日子倘好過. (12) [Subtitle]: 但所有的漂泊 攏變作是笑話. (13) [Subtitle]: 早就沒回頭路 有誰人會跟我做伙.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator performing in a studio.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with short reddish-brown hair, wearing a black T-shirt, a decorative black necklace, and patterned arm sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional recording studio with dark green curtains and a warm accent lamp in some shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male singer performing a high-energy rock song in Southern Min (Hokkien). His voice is projected and intense, characterized by a raspier texture in the higher registers, indicating emotional strain. The background music features a prominent drum beat and distorted electric guitar riffs. The tempo is approximately 115 BPM. The vocal delivery is continuous with very few pauses, following the melodic lines of the song. (2) At a distinct transition point, the vocals cease completely, giving way to a soaring electric guitar solo. The guitar has a heavy distortion and high sustain, playing melodic and technical phrases. The drum kit continues with a steady, driving rhythm, maintaining the high arousal of the track. The acoustic environment is very clean, typical of a professional studio recording, with high spectral brightness and excellent signal-to-noise ratio.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Song Intro -> Climax -> Instrumental Break
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a passionate musical performance, specifically a song with lyrics about social struggle, regret, and the hardness of life in Taipei.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video focuses heavily on the emotional delivery of the singer, utilizing standard studio equipment as visual anchors.
